import "github.com/googleapis/mcp-toolbox-sdk-go/tbgenkit" Index Constants func ToGenkitTool(tool *core.ToolboxTool, g *genkit.Genkit) (ai.Tool, error) Constants Version is the current version of the library. This is updated automatically by release-please.
const Version = "0.8.0" // x-release-please-version func ToGenkitTool func ToGenkitTool(tool *core.ToolboxTool, g *genkit.Genkit) (ai.Tool, error) ToGenkitTool converts a custom ToolboxTool into a genkit ai.Tool Inputs:
tool: A pointer to the custom `core.ToolboxTool` to be converted. g: A pointer to the `genkit.Genkit` instance to register the tool. Returns:
An `ai.Tool` interface instance representing the Genkit-compatible tool. Returns `nil` if there are critical errors during the conversion process. Generated by gomarkdoc
title: MCP Toolbox Go SDK — Tbgenkit (dev)
